---
title: "aim1_longitudinal"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

# Load packages and data
```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

apoe <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_apoe.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))
clinical <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, "PREVENTAD_clinical_imp_filtered_raw.rds"))
cogd_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_cogd_scored_dat.rds"))
diagnosis <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_diagnosis.rds"))
fhx <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                         "PREVENTAD_fhx_filtered.rds"))
grs <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_GRS.rds"))
libra_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_libra_scored_dat.rds"))

predictors_dat <- grs %>%
  left_join((clinical %>%
               select(CONP_ID, Candidate_Age, Sex, Education_years) %>%
               mutate(Candidate_Age = Candidate_Age/12)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((cogd_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_cogd)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(fhx, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((libra_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_libra2)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Candidate_Age, Sex, Education_years, apoe_category, 
         score_cogd, GRS, score_libra2, FDR_ext_AD)

biomarkers_longit <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  #arrange(visit_date) %>%
  mutate(
    baseline_date = first(Date_taken),
    time = interval(ym(baseline_date), ym(Date_taken)) / years(1),
    baseline_age = first(Candidate_Age)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  relocate(baseline_date, .after=Date_taken) %>%
  relocate(time, .after=baseline_date) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, time, BIOMARKERS)
```


# Get last measured biomarkers
```{r}
ptau217_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ptau217_simoa_UGOT)) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Date_taken, Candidate_Age, ptau217_simoa_UGOT) %>%
  slice_tail() 

other_biomarkers_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, BIOmodelARKERS) %>%
  select(-ptau217_simoa_UGOT) %>%
  filter_at(vars(-CONP_ID), all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  slice_tail() 

all_dat <- biomarkers_longit %>%
  left_join(predictors_dat, by="CONP_ID") 
```



```{r}
longitudinal_results <- list()

# Loop through each biomarker
for (biomarker in BIOMARKERS) {
  
  cat("\n=== Longitudinal Analysis:", biomarker, "===\n")
  
  # Create log-transformed variable
  data_temp <- all_dat %>%
    mutate(log_biomarker = log(.data[[biomarker]]))
  
  # Model 1: Time only (baseline trajectory)
  L1 <- lmer(log_biomarker ~ time + Candidate_Age + Sex + Education_years + 
             (1 + time | CONP_ID),
             data = data_temp,
             REML = FALSE)
  
  # Model 2: Add genetics (no interactions)
  L2 <- lmer(log_biomarker ~ time + Candidate_Age + Sex + Education_years + 
             apoe_category + GRS + FDR_ext_AD +
             (1 + time | CONP_ID),
             data = data_temp,
             REML = FALSE)
  
  # Model 3: Add clinical risk scores (no interactions)
  L3 <- lmer(log_biomarker ~ time + Candidate_Age + Sex + Education_years + 
             apoe_category + GRS + FDR_ext_AD + score_libra2 + score_cogd +
             (1 + time | CONP_ID),
             data = data_temp,
             REML = FALSE)
  
  # Model 4: Test if risk factors predict RATE OF CHANGE
  # This is the key model for your hypothesis!
  L4 <- lmer(log_biomarker ~ time * (score_cogd + apoe_category + GRS + FDR_ext_AD) +
             #Candidate_Age + Sex + Education_years +
             (1 + time | CONP_ID),
             data = data_temp,
             REML = FALSE)
  
  # Extract results
  results_temp <- bind_rows(
    tidy(L1, effects = "fixed") %>% mutate(model = "L1_Time"),
    tidy(L2, effects = "fixed") %>% mutate(model = "L2_+Genetics"),
    tidy(L3, effects = "fixed") %>% mutate(model = "L3_+ClinicalRisk"),
    tidy(L4, effects = "fixed") %>% mutate(model = "L4_Interactions")
  ) %>%
    mutate(biomarker = biomarker)
  
  longitudinal_results[[biomarker]] <- results_temp
  
  # Model comparison
  comparison <- anova(L1, L2, L3, L4)
  cat("\nModel Comparison:\n")
  print(comparison)
  
  # Extract key interaction terms from L4
  L4_coef <- summary(L4)$coefficients
  
  # Convert to dataframe and handle column names dynamically
  L4_summary <- as.data.frame(L4_coef) %>%
    rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "time:"))
  
  # Standardize column names based on what's available
  # Typical formats: [Estimate, Std.Error, t value, df, Pr(>|t|)]
  # or: [Estimate, Std.Error, t value, Pr(>|t|)]
  ncol_coef <- ncol(L4_summary) - 1  # Subtract 1 for 'term' column
  
  if(ncol_coef == 5) {
    # Format: Estimate, Std.Error, t value, df, Pr(>|t|)
    colnames(L4_summary) <- c("term", "estimate", "std.error", "statistic", "df", "p.value")
  } else if(ncol_coef == 4) {
    # Format: Estimate, Std.Error, t value, Pr(>|t|)
    colnames(L4_summary) <- c("term", "estimate", "std.error", "statistic", "p.value")
  } else if(ncol_coef == 3) {
    # Format: Estimate, Std.Error, t value (no p-values)
    colnames(L4_summary) <- c("term", "estimate", "std.error", "statistic")
    # Calculate p-values manually
    L4_summary <- L4_summary %>%
      mutate(p.value = 2 * pt(abs(statistic), df = Inf, lower.tail = FALSE))
  }
  
  interactions <- L4_summary %>%
    select(term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value) %>%
    mutate(
      significant = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      biomarker = biomarker
    )
  
  cat("\nKey Time Interactions (predictors of rate of change):\n")
  print(interactions)
}

# Combine all results
all_longitudinal <- bind_rows(longitudinal_results)
```
